channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Combining cognitive tests with biomarkers may better predict dementia risk
item.description: Plasma p-tau217 was the strongest single biomarker for predicting progression to Alzheimer's dementia in patients with subjective cognitive decline.

item.title: Parkinson's risk significantly higher in people with schizophrenia
item.description: Patients with schizophrenia face a significantly higher risk of Parkinson's disease, with risk varying by the type of antipsychotic therapy used.

item.title: New studies examine tobacco regulation strategies
item.description: Health warnings first appeared on cigarette packaging 60 years ago. Researchers and health professionals have described tobacco as addictive since then.

item.title: Researchers identify new drug targets for hard-to-treat cancers
item.description: Despite medical advances, most advanced-stage cancers still have a poor prognosis. Developing more effective treatments requires a deeper understanding.
